branch.frontier_task_title: Define v5.0 actor skill packet contract
branch.branch_summary: Start TASK-049 by defining the v5.0 actor skill packet contract: objective, actor or role, required skill, capability-fit evidence, resource refs, policy refs, expected output contract, review criteria, blocker semantics, and Human Recognition Interface projection fields.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-049 sits on v5.0 after shipped v4.0.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-049: Define v5.0 actor skill packet contract
